title: Lessingianthus teyucuarensis
taxonomy: Lessingianthus teyucuarensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It belongs to the genus Lessingianthus, which is a group of plants native to South America. The classification of Lessingianthus teyucuarensis places it within the subfamily Vernonioideae, a clade of daisy family plants. This species is a type of herbaceous plant, characterized by its small size and delicate appearance. Its classification also includes the order Asterales and the class Magnoliopsida.

intro: Lessingianthus teyucuarensis, also known as "Lessingianthus," is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family (Asteraceae), native to South America. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help to reduce inflammation and fight off infections. The bioactive constituents of Lessingianthus teyucuarensis include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
